title: LumenStack AI
summary: I built LumenStack AI as a codebase architecture analyzer that parses repositories and generates Mermaid diagrams. Architected to accelerate developer onboarding and technical reviews.
proof: This project proves backend analysis flow, LLM orchestration, anti-hallucination guardrails, and multi-page product design.
details: Accepts repos or uploads and turns them into structured architecture summaries.
Added diagram generation, compare mode, retrieval-backed chat, and exports.
Designed to make unfamiliar codebases easier to understand instantly.
architecture: Repository input is parsed file by file.
Manifest and import patterns are used to infer dependency structure deterministically.
A structured analysis layer feeds diagrams and AI explanations.
The frontend presents the output as a guided, interactive developer product.
tradeoff: Balanced deterministic static analysis with AI explanation so the tool stays 100% accurate and grounded, rather than blindly relying on the LLM.
